name: retake-whiteboard
description: Retake Whiteboard MCP tools and Codex skill for Retake video workflow board operations.

interface.shortDescription: Run Retake video workflow board operations through Codex and MCP.
interface.longDescription: Retake Whiteboard provides MCP writeback tools and a Codex skill for Retake's video creation workflow board. The current MVP supports image-stage generation and annotation-driven image edits, while keeping the whiteboard as an independent web app and Codex as one execution route that imports generated assets and updates board result blocks.
defaultPrompt: Use Retake Whiteboard MCP tools to write this video workflow result back.
Bind this Codex workspace to my Retake Whiteboard board.
Run the Retake image-stage annotation edit and update the result block.
